results.title: How DFCCIL Is Transforming India's Freight Transportation Landscape
results.description: DFCCIL showcased its achievements in freight infrastructure, technology innovation and operational excellence at the IRSE National Convention & Exhibition 2026 held at Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi.

results.title: Inside Swapan Dasgupta's 'Marshall Plan' To Cut Losses, Build Bengal
results.description: Without sustained investment, Bengal risks remaining trapped in a cycle of debt and financial stress

results.title: European Economic News Preview: UK GDP Data Due
results.description: (RTTNews) - GDP and foreign trade from the UK and final inflation from Germany and France are due on Friday, headlining a busy day for the European economic news. At 2.00 am ET, the Office for National Statistics releases UK GDP, industrial output and foreign trade figures. The economy is forecast to shrink 0.1 percent in April, in contrast to...

results.title: Pilot union plans to call on European regulators to close labor loophole
results.description: The European Cockpit Association plans to publicly call on European regulators on Friday to close a loophole that it says airlines use to avoid labor laws - hiring pilots and cabin crew through outsourcing agencies, rather than as direct employees.
